must_detect.matched_text: Summary: Proposed subscription of senior unsecured convertible debentures by the Investor and strategic acquisition of up to a minority stake in the Target, subject to approvals.

Instrument/Pricing: Convertible debentures with conversion into ordinary shares post-approval; pricing and nominal value to be determined following regulator comments; no forward-looking guidance outside public domain.

Conditions Precedent: Board and shareholder approvals; acceptance of offering documents; execution of Data Processing Agreement (DPA) Schedule; completion of standard onboarding/KYC using generic forms.
Consent and Withdrawal: Consent withdrawal handling is set out in Onboarding Form TH-EMP-01; no current withdrawals affect the financing; contact via privacy@siamgreengrid.example (role mailbox).
